'''''Glazer''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that the [[Nharwaak]] used to ferry weapons technology to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] [[Xerxes (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Xerxes'']]. The ''Glazer'' was escorted in this mission by two other corvettes, the ''[[Coffey]]'' and the [[Janson (CR90 corvette)|''Janson'']].

In the ambush staged by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s attack from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]'' on the ''Xerxes'', ''Glazer'' and its escorts were also attacked.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
